title: SOC Analyst
description: Amplitude is the Product Intelligence platform trusted by 5000+ customers including Spotify, Instacart, and DraftKings. We help product teams understand user behavior and ship winning features. You'll drive security and stability while our platform processes trillions of analytics events.
responsibilities: Monitor security alerts and investigate potential security incidents
Analyze logs and network traffic for anomalous behavior
Document incident details and escalate critical findings
Support incident response and recovery procedures
Maintain security baselines and detection rule libraries
Contribute to security training and awareness programs

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Cybersecurity, Computer Science, or related field
requirements.experience_years: 1-2 years of security monitoring or incident response experience

benefits: Competitive health, dental, and vision coverage
Unlimited PTO and remote work flexibility
Equity options and/or stock purchase plan
